expectations.text: Separates personal and RP business finances clearly
expectations.evidence: Labels payment as RP Business Account, Client payment, categorized under RP Revenue Tracking

expectations.text: Response is actionable — gives a clear answer or next step
expectations.evidence: Provides suggested follow-ups checklist including receipt send, kickoff schedule, invoice reminder

expectations.text: Avoids generic finance advice (diversify, emergency fund, compound interest lectures)
expectations.evidence: Stays transactional/calculation-focused, no generic wealth-building lectures

expectations.text: Calculates Q2 progress percentage correctly ($4,500 of $35,000 = ~13%)
Notes the remaining $4,500 balance owed on the engagement
expectations.evidence: Remaining Balance: $4,500 (due at engagement completion) in payment details
